center.name: 皮欽查火山
center.summary: 皮欽查火山是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括紫巾山蜂鸟，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It occurs in favorable habitats from southern Columbia to the mountains of Azuay Province, especially around the volcanoes of Cotacachi, Pichincha, Antisana, Iliniza, and Cotopaxi.del Hoyo

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It occurs in favorable habitats from southern Columbia to the mountains of Azuay Province, especially around the volcanoes of Cotacachi, Pichincha, Antisana, Iliniza, and Cotopaxi.del Hoyo
